programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble becomes a cutman for a fighter who knows he has brain damage but refuses to quit

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble finds himself distrusted when he joins a group of fruit harvesters, and must win them over

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team is asked to investigate when three convicts break out of prison, including a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the other criminals steal billions of dollars online. Meanwhile, Paige struggles to manage Ralph's expectations when his father returns. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: A musical prodigy assists Scorpion in investigating the murder of his friend, who was a music industry blogger. Meanwhile, Drew takes Ralph to a baseball game and later visits the headquarters to seek Walter's advice in a bid to help him connect with his son. Drama, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Assistant coroner Palmer is called to the building site on a Navy base where a body has been found. While looking into the incident, he spots an armed man fleeing the scene with the victim's passport and is almost killed as he gives chase. It appears the document was stolen to hinder the investigation, but the discovery of a second corpse reveals a case of stolen identity and a compensation racket

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, the entire team is put in danger while hunting for the killer of a former NCIS agent. Jenny Shepard calls in Mike Franks for help, afraid she too is a target - and convinced Gibbs will be next. American crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Vance sticks rigidly to the rules as he investigates the death of a fellow agent, but Gibbs and Franks take matters into their own hands to catch the killers. The case also leads to major changes for the agency. Drama, starring Rocky Carroll, Mark Harmon and Muse Watson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony tries to piece together the events that led to him lying wounded in a hospital bed, having been shot in the chest through his bulletproof vest. Under the guidance of therapist Dr Rachel Cranston, his memory begins to return and suspicion falls on his ex-lover EJ Barrett. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Sarah Jane Morris

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The investigators examine the death of US marine Tommy Hill, who appears to have been fatally stabbed en route to a homecoming party thrown in his honour by his foster family. McGee and Ziva follow a trail of blood that leads them to a mobile phone, while Abby discovers the victim had been trying to hack into Virginia's state website and Ducky's autopsy reveals that Hill had been injected with a sedative

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team is asked to investigate when three convicts break out of prison, including a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the other criminals steal billions of dollars online. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team becomes involved in an international incident when the body of an American petty officer is found by an estate agent in a bungalow that has been repossessed. An indentation on the victim's skull leads the agents to believe he was killed on a British ship, but collecting evidence from the vessel proves challenging. Guest starring Tracy Middendorf, Daniel Gillies and Kristen Ariza

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the deaths of a radio DJ and a naval officer who were both killed during a live broadcast, only to discover there are a number of potential suspects. Evidence leads the agents to suspect the involvement of a radical group called Military at Home, prompting Tony to investigate an upmarket gated community - where his door-to-door inquiries yield an enticing proposition or two from the female residents. American drama, starring Michael Weatherly, with Nadia Bjorlin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes personally involved in the case of a murdered naval scientist who she regards as a kindred spirit. The team's initial inquiries turn up little concrete information about the victim's life, but the forensic specialist makes a breakthrough when she decodes some of the mysterious markings covering the body. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team members are surprised when Gibbs asks DiNozzo's father to join them in their investigation of a murder committed at the US Naval Academy. However, Tony Sr's experience turns out to play a vital role in the inquiry, which finds the team members hunting for a missing nuclear weapon they suspect is about to be sold on the black market. Guest starring Robert Wagner

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Ziva confronts her past when the team is ordered to protect her father, Mossad director Eli David, at a gathering of former heads of NCIS. The agents discover he is being targeted by terrorists who have hijacked a shipment of advanced weapons from the army. Drama, guest starring TJ Ramini and Michael Nouri, with Cote de Pablo and Michael Weatherly

Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team must ascertain whether the murder of a Navy officer, whose body was found on a rural road, was the result of a bar fight or because he knew too much about an attack on a fellow female officer. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and McGee begin a juice detox to purge their bodies of impurities. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Return of the American drama following the work of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service. Gibbs and McGee travel to Russia to escort a computer expert connected to classified intel. However, the mission is compromised and they are forced to go off the grid while being hunted by Russian mercenaries. Meanwhile, the team in DC frantically tries to locate the missing pair. Mark Harmon and Sean Murray star

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles

Meanwhile, the discovery that a member of Kensi's father's unit faked his own death prompts Granger to back down from his suspicions of his colleague. Crime drama, starring Daniela Ruah and Miguel Ferrer

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team is forced to establish whether the gunning down of a man outside the Vietnamese Consulate is an isolated incident or a terrorist attack, facing a race against time to ensure the safety of delegates at an upcoming international conference. Crime drama, guest starring Dan Lauria (The Wonder Years)

Military adventure, starring Sean Bean and Pete Postlethwaite

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions arrive on an abandoned spaceship, which allows them to travel back in time to 18th-century France. A little girl the Doctor befriends grows up to be Louis XV's mistress, and the time lord must discover why she is being pursued all her life by the ship's sinister clockwork robots. Sophia Myles guest stars alongside David Tennant and Billie Piper

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Tardis is unexpectedly thrown into a parallel universe. While Rose is amazed to learn her father is still alive in this alternative reality, the Doctor discovers a new generation of one of his old enemies, the Cybermen, is poised to take over the world. Roger Lloyd Pack guest stars

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Cybermen seize control of London and begin transforming the population into more of their kind. Jackie falls under Lumic's control, while the Doctor and his companions are forced to go on the run. As the mechanical villains' power grows, a desperate attack is mounted on the factory at the heart of their schemes. Roger Lloyd Pack guest stars

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy gets the chance to show off his talents as a concert promoter when Wesley almost runs over Billy Ingleton - a man who dreams of performing a piano recital. Christmas special from 1995, guest starring Norman Wisdom, with Bill Owen, Peter Sallis and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: David Jason stars in this follow-up to Roy Clarke's popular comedy Open All Hours. Once the dogsbody, Granville has inherited the business from his miserly uncle Albert Arkwright, but he is not alone in running the shop - he now has his own assistant in the shape of his son Leroy, who proves more popular with the ladies than his dad ever did. It's a typical day at the grocer's as Granville tries to get a date with old flame Mavis without her terrifying sister Madge finding out, while Leroy shuns the old delivery bike in favour of an altogether more attractive way to take out the orders. James Baxter and Lynda Baron co-star, with appearances by Johnny Vegas, Mark Williams, Brigit Forsyth, Nina Wadia and Sally Lindsay

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: As the Brokenwood Golf Club gathers for its Wednesday morning round, a zombie-like figure lurches from the morning mist identified as Alison Stone, the wealthy club owner. Her face red and blistering, she collapses into a bunker and dies leaving Mike and Kristin to investigate an apparent homicide by poisoning. Detective drama, starring Neill Rea, Fern Sutherland, Pana Hema Taylor and Nic Sampson

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The clerical sleuth encounters a voodoo priest who is intent on winning back the woman he loves - no matter the cost. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An unknown tagger begins to paint graffiti around London, and claims to have been responsible for killing a celebrated street artist four years previously. Originally part of a gang, the victim went solo after receiving support from a wealthy art patron, and when the detectives reopen the case, they become suspicious of his resentful former crew members. Meanwhile, Brian signs up to a social networking site as TopCop999 to chart the gritty life of a lawman, much to his colleagues' displeasure

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Determined to end the violence once and for all - and to establish a name for himself - Zain Nadir makes a high-risk decision to broker a deal with gang member Jordan Tomlin. A new suspect is found in the Amy Tennant case when it emerges her gymnastics teacher is a sex offender and a hidden camera is found in the girls' changing room. Terry Perkins betrays his feelings for Ramani at her farewell party

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Zain's off-the-record deal with gang member Jordan Tomlin backfires when a CID sting delivers only two of the promised eight automatic weapons. Suzie Sim feels guilty about putting James Tennant through the heartbreak of watching a reconstruction of his daughter's disappearance, but it pays off when a witness comes forward to corroborate his alibi. Terry Perkins overcomes his shyness and finally reveals his true feelings for Ramani

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Gina returns from Australia and finds Dale Smith in the depths of despair in Long Marsh Prison. Sam Nixon has to persuade a furious woman not to press charges against probationer Emma Keane when a heated investigation turns physical, and Yvonne is obliged to have Sun Hill's other rookie, Lewis Hardy, taken off a case after he accuses Roger Valentine of racism in front of a suspect

programme.title: Cranford
programme.desc: First in a two-part special. The story picks up in August 1844, two years after Miss Matty lost her beloved sister Deborah. Mr Buxton has returned to live quietly in Cranford following the death of his wife, although Miss Matty is concerned about his relationship with his son as neither seem to be coping with their bereavement. The local busybody is also worried about Peggy Bell, who lives in an isolated cottage looking after her inattentive mother and domineering brother, so she hatches a plot to bring these young residents together. However, the surprise arrival of Lady Ludlow's son Lord Septimus leads to a chain of unexpected events concerning the looming railway, and a tragedy at Matty's own house forces her to re-evaluate her opinions on the subject. Judi Dench and Jonathan Pryce star

programme.title: Cranford
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part special. The women of Cranford are excited about the imminent visit of Lady Glenmire, until the Hon Mrs Jamieson announces that none of them is of high enough social standing to meet her - so Miss Matty leads the Amazons in snubbing both the newcomer and her hostess. But sociable Lady Glenmire is quick to offer an olive branch by hosting a memorable Halloween party, which results in the forging of new friendships. Mr Buxton is impressed by Edward Bell's ambitions, so takes him on as land agent, only for the new employee to make a disastrous decision that has dire consequences for both himself and his sister Peggy. Meanwhile, Matty is distressed when a surprising discovery about one of her close circle results in a serious falling out among the friends, and when tragedy strikes the town, she fears Cranford may never recover. Judi Dench, Celia Imrie and Jonathan Pryce star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Easter approaches in the spring of 1961, and Patsy helps to deliver a baby that is born with severe deformities. Her husband struggles to cope with his daughter's needs, but the sisters rally round to support the family. Trixie teaches a keep fit class which results in a medical emergency, leaving her determined to teach her patients to understand their own bodies

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara treats a pregnant woman whose dockworker husband is struggling to support her as opportunities for work dry up. She is forced into a difficult decision that leaves Barbara facing the biggest test of her career. Nurse Crane meets a kindred spirit when she learns to speak Spanish, and Sister Evangelina helps a woman with breastfeeding, leading to unforeseen consequences

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth press-gangs a reluctant Richard into helping repair the lights at the local church hall. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth volunteers to help with an OAP day-trip to the seaside, but her plans bring nothing but trouble, landing her in the arms of an amorous Italian pensioner. Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift star

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth prepares for the Mayor's annual fancy-dress ball, only to have her dream of wearing a regal costume shattered. Fortunately, an important new neighbour could provide the chance to claw back some social credibility. Roy Clarke's comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Saint Marie celebrates getting through to the final of the Inter-Island Volleyball Championships, but the party atmosphere is short-lived when one of the players is stabbed through the heart. With such a high-profile murder, DI Goodman and the team are under pressure to solve the crime as soon as they possibly can, while Commissioner Patterson squares up to old enemy Anton Burrage, the governor-elect of the rival volleyball team's island. Joe Absolom (Doc Martin) and Colin McFarlane (The Dark Knight) guest star

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Alexa is tasked to infiltrate the world of lycra when Hugh Miller, the chief financial officer of a huge hospitality company, dies mysteriously while on his morning bicycle ride. She quickly identifies a prime suspect in Roger Sims, the CEO of the hospitality business. Detective thriller, starring Lucy Lawless and Bernard Curry

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: World-weary detective inspector John Rebus goes on the trail of a copycat serial killer, only to be taken off the case pending an inquiry into the death of a convicted murderer he helped put behind bars 15 years earlier. Crime drama based on the books by best-selling author Ian Rankin, starring John Hannah, Jim Norton, Ewan Stewart, Sara Stewart and Joanna Roth

programme.title: The Last Post
programme.desc: Drama about military police and their families faced with political and personal conflicts in a 1960s British colony on the Red Sea coast. An officer and his wife arrive in Aden, where he is to replace a much-loved captain. He soon has to adjust to life on the frontline, along with resentment among the men that he was appointed instead of the already-present Lt Ed Laithwaite. Honor is taken under the wing of Laithwaite's wife, Alison, who had been having an affair with Captain Page. Starring Jessie Buckley and Jeremy Neumark Jones

programme.title: The Last Post
programme.desc: Mary goes into labour while her husband has left the city to rendezvous with the SAS, who are returning to Aden after a secret mission to capture a dangerous fugitive. When things go badly wrong, Harry must choose between his men and his family. An American reporter ingratiates herself with the troops, to Joe's annoyance, and Honor joins an exclusive club

programme.title: The Last Post
programme.desc: Christmas comes to Aden, and the RMP receive some welcome news as romance blossoms between Armstrong and Yusra. Markham is concerned that the photographs taken by Martha could cause a scandal, and sends Joe to retrieve them - but he finds himself dangerously attracted to her. Ed confesses to Alison that he knows about her secret as they try to reconnect in the wake of a recent tragedy

programme.desc: The fire-fighting team faces a race against time as it struggles to save a girl trapped in a silo. Meanwhile, Bayleaf is sent up a crane to talk a suicidal boy down

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Zain Nadir's maverick approach to the gangland gun trafficking blows up into a full-scale crisis when his informant is shot during a DJ contest. Lewis Hardy resolves to have nothing more to do with cousin Dominic when he learns of his involvement in the crime, while Adam Okaro has a public relations nightmare to sort out when the victim's mother criticises the police's handling of the case

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Abra begins clearing his desk after his suggestion of night ops is turned down by the CEO and Lord Byrne's health takes a turn for the worse when Joseph berates him for not seeing through Jac. Meanwhile, unease about Thandie's incompetence grows and Ric is confronted by his colleagues for defending her

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Chloe turns to Comfort and Nikki for help as she becomes convinced Jason has deserted her and the police probe her involvement in Lewis's escape - but her plan leads to trouble when she fails to keep her mind on the job in hand. In her absence, investigating officers turn their attentions to Tony, using his criminal record as leverage in their search for evidence of Chloe's guilt. Drama, starring Jan Anderson, Martina Laird and Kelly Harrison

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. Smithy upsets the Longmarsh heavies by spurning their offer of protection and is beaten up for his pains, but it is the approach of Louise's funeral that drives him to despair. Dan Casper enters a supposedly empty flat where he is surprised to find a naked woman, and her confused explanation of how she came to be there finally gives the Sun Hill detectives a lead in the Pete Larson case. Bill Treacher guest stars

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Sharon is behaving strangely and Grant can't fathom why. Mark is depressed when Ruth leaves, David questions Ricky about the missing petty cash, and Sharon and Michelle make up

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: David and Ricky bicker at the car lot, while Pat and Geoff discover they have things in common

programme.title: London's Burning
programme.desc: Fiona is forced to tell Pearce her big secret, prompting him to storm out of the house. As the day of the wedding dawns, he is still nowhere to be seen

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Personal dilemmas continue to overshadow the medical agenda, as Kate agonises over Will's suggestion that they move in together, and both of them begin to worry more for Andrew, who is on anti-depressants following the breakdown of his marriage. Unfortunately, he doesn't make things any easier for himself by getting over-involved with a pretty medical student. Drama, starring Simon Shepherd, Saskia Wickham and Gary Mavers

programme.title: Dangerfield
programme.desc: A straightforward suicide case takes a sinister turn for Paul when he comes to a bizarre conclusion. Drama, starring Nigel Le Vaillant and Michael Melia

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey rings a local radio station with advice for a grieving widow and ends up becoming the airwaves' latest agony aunt _ but can she pluck up the courage to admit she'll only be a 'widow' herself for as long as Her Majesty pleases? Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Waiting for God
programme.desc: A vicar suffers a nervous breakdown at a resident's funeral and Tom's son has trouble with his nymphomaniac wife. Comedy, starring Stephanie Cole and Graham Crowden

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Herr Flick interrogates Gruber about The Fallen Madonna with the Big Boobies and Rene repays Monsieur Alphonse using forged notes. Comedy, starring Gorden Kaye, Guy Siner and Richard Gibson

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard has had enough of Pearl and decides to leave home for ever. However, he soon finds he misses her, so the trio try to reunite the couple. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde, with Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Millionaire environmentalist and scientist Dan Hagen is shot on his boat while out at sea, and all the evidence points toward a robbery gone wrong, but DI Goodman suspects foul play by a crew member. The team soon realises the group are not as close-knit as they initially seem, and with everyone hiding a secret, the pressure is on to get to the bottom of how and why Dan was killed. The case gives the British detective a sudden desire to become a sailor, while Florence surprises the team with her action hero credentials. Caribbean crime drama, starring Kris Marshall and Joséphine Jobert

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island is rocked when Saint Marie's governor Caroline Bamber drops dead at her leaving party, with the commissioner standing right next to her. As DI Goodman and the team try to deduce how she could have been poisoned without their boss noticing any foul play, they find themselves entering the murky world of island politics, where blackmail, threats and corruption seem commonplace - fuelled by ongoing tension between the French and British. Meanwhile, Humphrey braves the world of online dating, under the guidance of ladies' man Dwayne - and soon finds his perfect match. Lucy Cohu and Nigel Lindsay guest star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The squad investigates a long-running feud between two family ice-cream businesses, which resulted in a shooting and several armed raids 10 years ago. Standing enlists the aid of his daughter in cracking the case, and she discovers evidence of drug dealing - but Pullman does not approve of her involvement. With Dennis Waterman and Amanda Redman, alongside guest star Jodie Kelly

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The team attends a triple murder at a farmhouse, where the investigating detective, Supt Tom Byrne, wastes no time making his presence felt. The pathologists soon make a breakthrough when DNA found at the scene matches that of a mysterious female serial killer - although Nikki has cause to question the direction they are heading in. The case is proving difficult for Leo, however, whose mind is in turmoil following the suicide of an old friend. Guest starring Vincent Regan and Shelley Conn
