programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: After receiving a chilling phone call, the detective and sidekick DC Presley stumble on an exotic animal smuggling ring at a farm - where it appears an old adversary of Frost has been eaten by a crocodile. Meanwhile, a couple return from holiday to find the naked corpse of a man in their bedroom, prompting the husband to assume his wife was having an affair. Starring David Jason

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate a murder committed on the first night of a quiz weekend held at Chaucer College. Sealing the college grounds to interrogate the remaining 11 contestants, the pair discover the victim had a track record for sexual harassment involving fellow competitors, as well as past dealings with a shady engineering business funded by Russian gangsters and masterminded by Oxford professor Charles Milner - another quiz fan. With guest stars Alan Davies (QI), Timothy West (Bleak House) and Nicholas Farrell (The Iron Lady)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's the day of the Little Crosby Folk Festival and organiser Toby Winning is found dead, having drowned in a bowl of eggs and live eels. The murder seems to have been inspired by a ballad made famous by the late, lamented star Johnny Carver. Then it comes to light the victim recently announced plans to move the event to a new location, which would have cost local entrepreneur Frank Wainwright dearly. Toby's estranged wife Alice also comes under suspicion, before two further killings take place, echoing more lyrics from the song

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: After finding out at the age of 19 that the man who raised him was not his real dad, former British soldier David Smith yearns to find the biological father he has never met. After years of dreaming, he hopes to finally know what it feels like to be called 'son'. Meanwhile, Mandy Hearn, who was adopted as a baby in 1968, hopes to trace her birth mother. However, at just 13 years old when she gave birth, she is the youngest biological mother the programme has ever encountered. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.title: Prince Charles: Inside the Duchy of Cornwall
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary examines Charles's legacy for the Duchy, as senior staff prepare William for the day that he succeeds his father as the next Duke of Cornwall. The documentary also examines his well-known passion for trees and traditional rural crafts, and how these may shape the Duchy's future

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: A chance accident brings Charlotte Heywood to Sanditon, a seaside resort on the cusp of dramatic change. Spirited and unconventional, Charlotte is initially keen to experience everything the town has to offer, but is then shocked by its scheming and ambitious inhabitants, and intrigued by the secrets they share. Drama adapted from the unfinished novel by Jane Austen, starring Rose Williams, Theo James, Anne Reid, Kris Marshall and Kate Ashfield

programme.title: Vanity Fair
programme.desc: Adaptation of William Makepeace Thackeray's novel about an amoral woman who cunningly manipulates her way to the top of Georgian high society, while the Napoleonic wars rage around her. Starring Olivia Cooke and Claudia Jessie, with Michael Palin appearing as Thackeray himself

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin investigate when the body of missing 10-year-old Jodie Gaines is found in a skip. The pair immediately identify two main suspects - a taxi driver who claims to have dropped the girl off at her guitar lesson, and the teacher who swears she never arrived. The case then takes an unexpected turn, leaving Steel and Phillips with the toughest choices of their careers. Dervla Kirwan guest stars, alongside Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks, Devlin and Chandler investigate after a man is found badly beaten in a park. They discover the victim, Roland Kirk - who lives in a nearby camper van - had many enemies in the community, but nobody is willing to talk. The case then takes a decisive turn when a local man capitulates after being arrested and points the finger at architect Harry Morgan, whose son had recently turned against him and aligned himself with Kirk. Kevin McNally guest stars, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Harriet Walter

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Animal Orphans
programme.desc: Comedian Paul O'Grady presents the second of two reports from Borneo. He meets a five-year-old orang-utan that broke its arm in a fall from a tree, and is now having physiotherapy. But even if the fracture heals, will the patient have the confidence to start climbing again? The comedian also visits a centre dedicated to the conservation of sun bears - after pandas, the second most endangered bears in the world - and is introduced to a slow loris. Often sold illegally as pets, this one was so stressed it chewed off its own fingers and now needs to be taught to eat its usual diet of insects

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An FBI agent crosses swords with Poirot while trying to retrieve the American Navy's top-secret plans for a new submarine, which have been stolen by a glamorous nightclub singer with a sideline in espionage. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lydia opens up to Chas, Harriet is left uneasy by Cain's threats, and Jimmy tells Nicola not to interfere

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jamie is at his lowest ebb and soon trapped, Harriet defends Malone, and Tracy supports Charity

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Harriet is completely floored by Malone's admission, he and Will come to blows, and Charity makes a deal

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Derek uses a camcorder to record the transformation of the allotment. Jack's day at the races leads to the men winning big, and he knows what they should invest their money in

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail is furious after hearing Martin has invested in a racehorse, Maureen is sick of everyone being supportive of her, and Vicky is stunned when Alec arrives to stay

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: An ambulance races Dave to hospital, Frank stops Kim from seeing the patient, and Biff and Linda's wedding reception is interrupted as news about Dave filters through

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank offers to pay for Dave's funeral, but Ned refuses, and Biff and Linda confront Kim about what happened to Dave. Zak declares 1996 as one of the worst years of his life

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve Crane's wayward mother Babs arrives in Aidensfield, having fallen out with her screenwriter boyfriend and grown tired of the London arts scene. She causes all manner of chaos when a spate of burglaries provides her with the ideal opportunity to put her self-defence skills into practice. Meanwhile, Vernon Scripps has an amazing change in fortune. Rural drama, starring James Carlton

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid discovers why Jean is sulking and Sally and Mike will not talk to him. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Ruth talks her cantankerous landlord Rigsby into renting his newly vacated room to a friend of hers. Pilot episode of the classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Feature-length mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan as the genteel sleuth. A woman experiences an unsettling vision after moving into the home of her dreams - and it transpires she lived in the house as a child. Miss Marple investigates the history of the property and discovers it was connected with a baffling disappearance years before - which has never been solved. With Dawn French, Russ Abbot, Geraldine Chaplin, Phil Davis and Sarah Parish

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A dangerous ex-con returns to Aidensfield hoping to exact revenge on Merton, the officer who apprehended him, and takes Jenny hostage. Meanwhile, the village is rocked by a spate of car thefts and Vernon organises a charity auction. Drama, starring Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey and Paul Brennan

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv is furious about catching Terry with a mystery blonde. Ned worries about Jan who refuses to accept that Dave is dead. Tom and Kelly get intimate in a barn

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jan is upset to see Kathy with Sean. Albert tells Lisa about the bet, and she vows to get revenge on Zak. Viv is worried that Terry no longer wants to commit to her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vicky is pleased to see Alec, but Steve is keen for him to go. Mike signs the garage over to Don. Kevin tells Don that Mike had offered the garage to him for only £40,000

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley and Kelly arrange to have a date in the Rovers. Tricia is not happy when Josie labels Jamie a thief. Maureen is sick of Maud getting at her

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster teams up with a dashing man to investigate a series of poison-pen letters in the sleepy village of Lymstock. Two of the missives have led to the deaths of Mona Symmington, the wife of Lymstock solicitor Richard, and Agnes Woddell, the parlour maid at the Symmingtons' house. However, Miss Marple suspects there is more to these deaths than meets the eye. Murder mystery with an all-star cast, featuring Geraldine McEwan, James D'Arcy, Emilia Fox, Imogen Stubbs, Ken Russell, Harry Enfield and Kelly Brook

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A dangerous ex-con returns to Aidensfield hoping to exact revenge on Merton, the officer who apprehended him, and takes Jenny hostage. Meanwhile, the village is rocked by a spate of car thefts and Vernon organises a charity auction. Drama, starring Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey and Paul Brennan

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A Belgian film star arrives in London and summons her friend Poirot to unravel the mysterious threats she has been receiving, which demand the return of a priceless diamond, the Western Star. Rosalind Bennett guest stars

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective is assigned to investigate when a chocolate factory owner is murdered during a fox hunt. The case leads him to the sleepy Oxfordshire village of Chigton Green, and is soon complicated by the fatal shooting of a local couple with an apparent connection to the first victim. Endeavour uncovers a vicious campaign of gossip and rumour, and meets a local woman who inspires him to consider his future

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin are called to investigate when a man is attacked and his kidney is surgically removed. The focus quickly turns to finding the intended recipient of the organ, and the team is horrified to discover that it has been trafficked into the NHS and given to wealthy patient Joanna Woodleigh. When the case is handed over to the CPS, a conflict of interests becomes apparent as Steel and Phillips go up against George Castle in court. Denis Lawson guest stars, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet comes face to face with the man who left her fighting for life just months earlier - serial killer Geoff Hastings, who has vowed to finally reveal the full extent of his crimes. Rachel and the rest of the team investigate the racially motivated murder of a taxi driver. On the personal front, Andy refuses to take no for an answer, so Janet threatens to report him to the DCI. Crime drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones, with an appearance by Kevin Doyle (Downton Abbey's Molesley)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the popular crime drama, starring John Thaw as author Colin Dexter's Oxford detective who treats his cases as intellectual challenges. In this mystery, Morse is introduced to trusty Sergeant Lewis (Kevin Whately) and takes it upon himself to investigate the apparent suicide of a lady friend. Co-starring Gemma Jones, Patrick Troughton, James Grout and Peter Woodthorpe

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A prominent bank manager is almost killed by a hit-and-run driver just before he is due to set sail on the luxury liner Queen Mary. Convinced his life is in danger, he persuades Poirot to accompany him - and his valuable shipment of liberty bonds - to New York. But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster meets fellow enthusiasts Tommy and Tuppence at a nursing home, where the ramblings of an elderly resident prompt them to join forces and investigate the unsolved mystery of a murdered child. The trail leads to the Norfolk village of Farrell St Edmund, a community harbouring sinister secrets and tales of heartbreak. Geraldine McEwan heads an all-star cast, including Greta Scacchi, Anthony Andrews, Charles Dance, June Whitfield and Claire Bloom

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff uses his hospital radio show to talk about how he has forgiven Yasmeen and wants to help her. Abi moves into No 13, and when Adam spots Sinead's cardigan poking out of his bag, Daniel is embarrassed

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Yasmeen phones Geoff with a surprising message, and Adam suspects that Gary has killed Rick. Nicky informs Daniel they could do more than talk for the money he's paying her

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Yasmeen collapses on the first day of her trial, and Gary is concerned by Brian's interest in Beacon Woods because of a potential stash of Roman coins. Meanwhile, Ed worries that Aggie is working far too hard at the hospital

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A blizzard forces the sleuthing spinster to spend a night in isolated Sittaford House, situated on a Devon moor. Without explanation, the building's owner, up-and-coming politician Clive Trevelyan, decides to spend the evening in a local hotel - only for a Ouija board to predict his murder. Mystery drama with an all-star cast, including Geraldine McEwan, Robert Hardy, Matthew Kelly, Patricia Hodge and Mel Smith

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack returns to duty after a period of suspension, and finds himself investigating the murder of a man who had been leading a double life. In addition, he also has to deal with the baffling case of a man found dead with his right foot hacked off and replaced by a severed left foot. Drama, starring David Jason and Amanda Root

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Forest ranger Felicity Ward is blinded by mysterious lights while driving at night in the village of Cooper Hill and the next morning her car is found abandoned at the roadside, followed closely by the discovery of her body. Visiting UFO spotters in the village are convinced aliens are responsible, but as Barnaby and Nelson try to get to the truth, they unearth suspicions, betrayals and long-buried secrets along the way. Michelle Collins, Steve Evets, Alison Steadman, Steve Oram and Pip Torrens guest star

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of Midsomer resident and biscuit factory boss Eric Calder leads Barnaby and Nelson to Copenhagen. The pair join forces with local detectives Birgitte Poulsen and Anna Degn in the hunt for the killer, and during the course of their investigation they discover the businessman had numerous links to the capital. Anglo-Danish collaboration originally shown to mark Midsomer's 100th episode, guest starring Ann Eleonora Jorgensen (The Killing), Birgitte Hjort Sorensen (Borgen), Sanjeev Bhaskar and Joanna Scanlan, alongside Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The killing of a postman, whose doorstep deliveries often included more than just letters, rocks the idyllic rural hamlet of Goodman's Land and sends Barnaby on the trail of a murderer with vengeance in mind - if Sgt Troy can keep his eyes off the attractive village policewoman long enough to follow the clues. Murder mystery, guest starring Robert Glenister, with John Nettles, Daniel Casey and Gillian Kearney

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: An arson attack on a Turkish social club leaves 17 people dead and Brooks, Devlin and Chandler fearing the crime was racially motivated. They uncover a trail of false identities, but face opposition from a respected barrister when they need to remove a key piece of evidence from a suspect's leg. Meanwhile, Steel is forced to confront one of his oldest friends. Guest starring Charles Kay, with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A respected gynaecologist is accused of sexually assaulting a patient during a routine examination, but Brooks, Devlin and Chandler struggle to find any firm evidence and the team becomes divided. Crown Prosecutor Alesha Phillips refuses to accept defeat and takes on formidable defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone. Crime drama, guest starring Derek Riddell and Lesley Manville, with Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber, Harriet Walter and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A tragic communication error between officers leaves gay police constable Nick Bentley caught in the crossfire of armed drug dealers, with no back-up. Brooks and Devlin follow a lead to a small-time dealer who claims to have seen a second policeman standing nearby, doing nothing while his partner bled to death. The story shocks the detectives and their boss Chandler as they investigate a homophobic religious group at the centre of the incident involving members of their own force. Crime drama, starring Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Harriet Walter

programme.title: Barging Round Britain with John Sergeant
programme.desc: The broadcaster leaves central Manchester, heading east along the Rochdale Canal. Not long into his journey, John finds himself struggling to contend with 19th-century technology at a cotton works. Further up the canal, he helps out members of an conservation group clearing the waterway of dumped supermarket trollies. After passing into West Yorkshire, it's on to Hebden Bridge, famous for the hard-wearing material corduroy, before John tries his hand at clog-making in one of Britain's few remaining factories dedicated to the craft

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: The doctor and his wife hire a servant, unaware that the lady in question is his long-lost mother

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Dr Price and his wife hire a housekeeper, little realising that the woman is his long-lost mother

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida gets more than she bargained for during a visit to the fish and chip shop

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff uses his hospital radio show to talk about how he has forgiven Yasmeen and wants to help her. Abi moves into No 13, and when Adam spots Sinead's cardigan poking out of his bag, Daniel is embarrassed

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lydia opens up to Chas, Harriet is left uneasy by Cain's threats, and Jimmy tells Nicola not to interfere

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jamie is at his lowest ebb and soon trapped, Harriet defends Malone, and Tracy supports Charity

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Harriet is completely floored by Malone's admission, he and Will come to blows, and Charity makes a deal

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth contemplates retiring while on a trip to the Lake District, but shelves his plans when Hastings meets a woman whose collection of valuable miniature portraits has been stolen. David Suchet stars

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: After receiving a chilling phone call, the detective and sidekick DC Presley stumble on an exotic animal smuggling ring at a farm - where it appears an old adversary of Frost has been eaten by a crocodile. Meanwhile, a couple return from holiday to find the naked corpse of a man in their bedroom, prompting the husband to assume his wife was having an affair. Starring David Jason

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate a murder committed on the first night of a quiz weekend held at Chaucer College. Sealing the college grounds to interrogate the remaining 11 contestants, the pair discover the victim had a track record for sexual harassment involving fellow competitors, as well as past dealings with a shady engineering business funded by Russian gangsters and masterminded by Oxford professor Charles Milner - another quiz fan. With guest stars Alan Davies (QI), Timothy West (Bleak House) and Nicholas Farrell (The Iron Lady)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's the day of the Little Crosby Folk Festival and organiser Toby Winning is found dead, having drowned in a bowl of eggs and live eels. The murder seems to have been inspired by a ballad made famous by the late, lamented star Johnny Carver. Then it comes to light the victim recently announced plans to move the event to a new location, which would have cost local entrepreneur Frank Wainwright dearly. Toby's estranged wife Alice also comes under suspicion, before two further killings take place, echoing more lyrics from the song

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: After finding out at the age of 19 that the man who raised him was not his real dad, former British soldier David Smith yearns to find the biological father he has never met. After years of dreaming, he hopes to finally know what it feels like to be called 'son'. Meanwhile, Mandy Hearn, who was adopted as a baby in 1968, hopes to trace her birth mother. However, at just 13 years old when she gave birth, she is the youngest biological mother the programme has ever encountered. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.title: Prince Charles: Inside the Duchy of Cornwall
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary examines Charles's legacy for the Duchy, as senior staff prepare William for the day that he succeeds his father as the next Duke of Cornwall. The documentary also examines his well-known passion for trees and traditional rural crafts, and how these may shape the Duchy's future

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: A chance accident brings Charlotte Heywood to Sanditon, a seaside resort on the cusp of dramatic change. Spirited and unconventional, Charlotte is initially keen to experience everything the town has to offer, but is then shocked by its scheming and ambitious inhabitants, and intrigued by the secrets they share. Drama adapted from the unfinished novel by Jane Austen, starring Rose Williams, Theo James, Anne Reid, Kris Marshall and Kate Ashfield

But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars

programme.title: The Towering Inferno (1974)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: France v England. Jim Rosenthal presents a chance to see the semi-final at Stadium Australia in Sydney, as the sides battled it out for the right to face the hosts in the final. England went into the match as favourites and looked to fly-half Jonny Wilkinson for inspiration, and his form off the kicking tee proved to be crucial. The French thrashed Ireland in the quarter-finals to reach the last four, but torrential rain in Sydney was to prove a key factor in the match, with Sir Clive Woodward's men coping much better with the conditions. With analysis from Austin Healey, Will Carling and Francois Pienaar, and commentary by John Taylor and Steve Smith

programme.title: Gran Torino (2008)
programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang

programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars. With a new Rolls-Royce rival from Maybach, and the updated Volkswagen Arteon

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from May 1977, including Liverpool v Ipswich Town, Chelsea v Sheffield United and Bristol City v Leeds United

programme.title: Columbo Undercover (1994)
programme.desc: The detective dons various disguises to investigate the deaths of two men who apparently killed each other, his only clue being a fragment of a black-and-white photograph, and comes to suspect the double murder has a connection to a $4million bank robbery. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Ed Begley Jr, Burt Young and Tyne Daly

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Francesca Cumani and Ed Chamberlin present live coverage of four races from Ascot, including the 3.35 Princess Margaret Stakes, Plus, three races from York, including the 3.15 Lyric Stakes, and the Tattersalls Gold Cup from The Curragh. With analysis from Jason Weaver, reports by Matt Chapman, and commentary from Mark Johnson

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Neil Spooner and Tom Dove's mission to track down the world's largest carp takes them to Slovenia, visiting a remote lake full of submerged trees and a park lake that produced the country's record catch of almost 80lb

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood looks back at television sporting firsts, including footage of a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan who would go on to take snooker by storm

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2003 Relived
programme.desc: Australia v England. Jim Rosenthal presents a look back at the final at Stadium Australia in Sydney. Clive Woodward's men took on the hosts in a tightly contested affair that was dramatically decided by a drop-goal in the final seconds of extra time. With analysis from Michael Lynagh, Will Carling and Francois Pienaar, and commentary by John Taylor and Steve Smith

programme.title: Space Cowboys (2000)
programme.desc: A former Air Force test pilot, who was sidelined from space exploration because of his difficult character, is recruited 40 years later to help America's post-Cold War Russian allies. Teaming up with three fellow veteran airmen, he uses his expertise in navigation to stop a malfunctioning Soviet satellite from crashing to Earth. Adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Tommy Lee Jones, James Garner, Donald Sutherland and James Cromwell

programme.title: Fargo (1996)
programme.desc: A downtrodden car dealer arranges to have his wife abducted, hoping her father will pay the ransom. Comedy thriller from the Coen brothers, starring Frances McDormand, Steve Buscemi and William H Macy

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Members of the local travelling community are blamed when a car-dealer friend of Arthur's has the frighteners put on him. However, they soon prove useful allies when those actually responsible are revealed. Comedy drama, guest starring Jimmy Nail and June Whitfield

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan adopts a new identity as an ex-con and goes undercover as a truck driver to expose a gang of ruthless hijackers. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar has to find out whether a cool blonde is a secret agent or a crook - and if she could do him harm. Sixties spy adventure, directed by and starring Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robin and the outlaws leave Sherwood to defend a distant village from a band of phantom horsemen known as the Hounds of Lucifer, who terrorise the countryside on the orders of a powerful coven ruled by Morgwyn of Ravenscar. Guest starring Rula Lenska

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo investigate a series of attacks on a giant corporation by a mysterious terrorist group, and uncover a shocking secret

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry fall under the spell of a bewitching Australian beauty who has ventured from Down Under in search of her missing fiance. However, she may just happen to be concealing an ulterior motive. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV Sport archives to take a look back at James Hunt, Barry Sheene and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Manchester United v Benfica. Barry Davies presents another chance to see the 1968 European Cup final at Wembley Stadium. United were aiming to become the first English team to win the trophy just 10 years after the Munich air disaster killed eight of their players and ended the careers of two more. With analysis from Billy Wright, and commentary by Hugh Johns and Ron Greenwood

programme.title: European Cup Winners: Liverpool
programme.desc: A look at Liverpool's four European Cup triumphs between 1977 and 1984, charting how manager Bob Paisley helped them to become a European superpower after his predecessor Bill Shankly had laid the foundations. With highlights of the finals and interviews with some of the key individuals involved

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: Harry Redknapp takes his team of ex-England players on a European tour, as they prepare for a rematch against the German Legends on their own soil. They begin in France at a self-catering hotel in the quiet medieval town of Provins, where Harry wants them to be on a detox and cook their own healthy food, but they don't even get through the first night without hitting the beers and ending up at the curry house

programme.title: Metro (1997)
programme.desc: A wisecracking police negotiator meets his match in a ruthless jewel thief, who has not only murdered one of his best friends but has also taken a group of innocent victims hostage - including the cop's former girlfriend. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Michael Rapaport, Michael Wincott and Carmen Ejogo

programme.title: Skeletons of the Mary Rose: The New Evidence
programme.desc: Scientists and historians use isotope and DNA analysis to identify the crew of Henry VIII's flagship, which sank off the coast of Portsmouth in 1545. With the help of Mary Rose Trust curator Alex Hildred, the programme uncovers evidence that many of the sailors were of African origin, and traces surviving descendants of the only two members of the crew who can be identified by name. Plus, the little-known story of a 16th-century Guinean free-diver who retrieved several treasures from the wreck

programme.title: How to Build
programme.desc: Documentary charting the step-by-step process of the construction of an electric London taxi, from the pieces of aluminium chassis to the £60,000 power train eco-cab, with access-all-areas footage of each stage of the 28-hour production process

programme.title: The Post (2017)
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk

programme.title: Sicario (2015)
programme.desc: An FBI agent is recruited to join an elite government task force based on the border between the US and Mexico, charged with preventing drugs being smuggled into the country. The team is sent on a secret mission, and the new recruit is forced to question everything she believes in order to survive. Crime drama, starring Emily Blunt, Josh Brolin and Benicio Del Toro

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: The Simpsons

Plus, why Clare's dog Archie has a very special connection to the winner of Best in Show 2007

In the first episode, a tiny Jackahuahua puppy is in need of emergency spinal surgery after being attacked by a dog in the park, but it is not certain that he will be able to get back on his feet again after the operation. Elsewhere, a Bernese has a rare cyst in his elbow, requiring a challenging operation for removal, and an excitable Labrador requires elbow replacement surgery, which will result in a long and difficult road to recovery

However, new evidence - including testimony from the man himself - has taken this terrifying story in an even more disturbing direction. programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life of the queen's only daughter. The programme examines her skill as a horse rider, representing Britain in three-day eventing at the 1976 Olympics on her mother's horse, as well as her support for various charities and foundations, and the incident in 1974, when she survived an attempt to kidnap her and hold her to ransom

programme.title: Diana vs the Tabloids
programme.desc: A look at the Princess of Wales' complex relationship with the press, examining the deal she made with newspaper editors after her divorce from Prince Charles where in exchange for privacy she would feed their news desks stories. However, the tabloids' obsession with Diana, and her need of them to stay relevant, would become a dangerous game. What were the events that led to one of the most tragic deaths in recent history?

programme.title: Concorde: 120 Seconds to Disaster - 20 Years On
programme.desc: The incident from July 2000 when an Air France Concorde crashed shortly after take-off from Charles de Gaulle Airport. All 109 passengers and crew members on board were killed, as well as at least four people on the ground. The entire world reeled in shock as in 24 years of commercial flight, Concorde had an unblemished record and was considered to be one of the safest passenger planes in history. This documentary re-examines the causes of the incident, as revealed by French and British air crash investigators

programme.title: Wildlife SOS

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Historian Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century visionary Dutch artist Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn, who was famed for his skilful handling of light and shade in paintings portraying the human form. Born in Leiden in 1606, the eighth of nine children, his passion for art led him to an apprenticeship with a local painter, and from the time he was a 19-year-old he had a studio in Amsterdam, where he produced 75 self-portraits. Demand for his talents soon grew and success came when he was commissioned to paint The Anatomy Lesson of Dr Tulp

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of Lesley and Mark Irwin, who fell foul of a single mother and confidence trickster. After several months, the tenant fell behind with the rent and it was discovered she had advertised the home as a rental property and stole deposits from unwitting students hoping to move into the area. Plus, a family living in a cramped and cold multiple-occupancy house in south London, and have to share a bathroom and kitchen with other tenants, seek help from Lewisham Council

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: The Colemans from Salisbury swap homes, budgets and lives with the Morgan family from Hampshire, who are intrigued to know what life is like for the top 10-per-cent earners in the country. The Colemans have a large four-bedroom house, enjoy watersports and music festivals and have a weekly budget of about £1,800. The Morgans, meanwhile, who live in a second-floor flat, get by on £158 a week

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh couple Ben and Kate hope to achieve their dream of running a bar in the sun. They have just £30,000 to fund their entire move and are checking out five bars to rent. But will any of them fit the bill? Jo and Jan hold an auction to raise funds for their dog rescue shelter, and car salesman Duncan comes up with a radical plan to help his Costa del Sol dealership stay afloat

programme.title: Holiday Love Cheats
programme.desc: Documentary telling the stories of holiday romances gone wrong, and exposing those unscrupulous men who think nothing of scamming single female tourists out of thousands of pounds. Including the story of Diane from Scotland, who married a Sri Lankan hotel worker 33 years her junior - only to be left a widow with no life savings

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: The story of 16-year-old Mithun Chauhan, who suffers from an extremely rare genetic condition that has left him with large swollen lumps all over his face and body. His disfigurement has led to the creation of a rumour that his village has become home to a reclusive monster. The condition, known as neurofibroma, affects one in 33,000 people and causes tumours to grow along the nerve endings, with Mithun's case among the most extreme ever discovered

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Dan Jones examines Britain's most iconic canals, beginning with the 152-mile Grand Union Canal, which runs up the spine of the country. Constructed at the height of the Industrial Revolution, the task challenged even the greatest engineering minds of the time, including pioneers such as James Brindley, the man behind Britain's first commercial canal, and William Jessop, the person with whom responsibility lay for the building of the main link from Birmingham to London. Travelling along its route, Dan experiences first-hand the innovations behind its construction, including the Blisworth tunnel

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Seventeenth-century Dutch painter Jan Vermeer, the lowly son of an innkeeper and art dealer, lived an uneventful life, leaving fewer than 40 authenticated works and dying unknown outside his home town. Tim Marlow investigates how his talent came to be regarded as highly as Rembrandt's, and examines the simple domestic scenes that led to his posthumous rise to fame

He seeks the help of the woman who saved his life as he tries to find out what has happened. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Diane Kruger and January Jones

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones navigates Britain's longest canal to be built by just one company, the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Built to link the economically booming counties of Yorkshire and Lancashire, this 19th-century superhighway was experimental for the time, and made Liverpool the busiest port in the world. In Burnley, the cotton capital of the 19th century, Dan visits the world's only steam-powered cotton mill, where enough cloth was woven each year to reach to the moon and back two-and-a-half times

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Art historian Tim Marlow profiles influential painter JMW Turner, who divided the critics with his rapid brush-strokes, treatment of light and tendency toward abstraction, but is now hailed as one of the great British artists

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to a couple in Beckenham, Kent, whose 1930s-style house has been on the market for more than 14 months. She wastes no time in getting down to business, renting modern furniture, stripping the hall of clutter, exposing original features and neutralising the wallpaper

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie (1998)
programme.desc: Tommy tries to return his new brother to the baby shop, helped by Angelica, Chuckie, Phil and Lil - but the friends become lost in dense woodlands en route, turning their expedition into a scary and exciting journey of discovery. Animated comedy based on the TV series, with the voices of Elizabeth Daily, Christine Cavanaugh, Kath Soucie, Whoopi Goldberg and Busta Rhymes

programme.title: Epic (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into a forest that her scientist father believes is home to a race of miniature people. She stumbles on the tiny creatures and is shrunk down to their size so she can carry out a quest to save their new queen from an invading army. Animated adventure, with the voices of Amanda Seyfried, Josh Hutcherson, Colin Farrell and Christoph Waltz

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Chaos (2005)
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his inexperienced new partner are assigned to investigate a bank heist. At first sight, no money appears to have been stolen. However, it eventually emerges the criminal mastermind behind the robbery had a more complex and profitable scheme in mind - and a possible connection to the detective on his trail. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Ryan Phillippe and Wesley Snipes

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: Horns (2013)
programme.desc: A man who has become an outcast after being accused of murdering his own girlfriend wakes up one morning to find he has grown horns. He discovers he now has the power to compel people to confess their sins or act on their darkest desires, and uses his supernatural gifts to expose the real killer. Horror based on Joe Hill's novel, starring Daniel Radcliffe and Juno Temple

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: Monster Trucks (2016)
programme.desc: A drilling operation unleashes a subterranean creature which feeds on oil. The monster bonds with a monster truck which a local teenager is building from spare parts, and the youngster befriends the beast and helps it to return to its underground home. Fantasy adventure, starring Lucas Till and Jane Levy

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle (2016)
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: Goat (2016)
programme.desc: New college student Brad is desperate to fit into his new surroundings, so taking a cue from his older brother, he decides to pledge a fraternity. All goes well at first as he attends parties and meets several girls, but as he enters into the final stretch of the pledging ritual-known as hell week, Brad finds things taking a violent turn as he has to endure a series of brutal initiation rituals. Fact-based drama, with Ben Schnetzer and Nick Jonas

programme.title: Chevalier (2015)
programme.desc: Six men on a fishing holiday on a luxury motor yacht play parlour games to while away the time in the evenings, but a row provokes a proposal to play a game to determine which of them is the superior man, with the winner being awarded a Chevalier signet ring. The game grows increasingly brutal and competitive as they strive to outshine each other. Greek comedy, starring Yiorgos Kendros and Panos Koronis. In Greek and English

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: The award-winning BSL comedy sketch show, which takes a look at the funny side of Deaf life

programme.title: Arthur's Hallowed Ground (1986)
programme.desc: A cricket groundsman plans to make the perfect pitch, but soon finds himself fighting a losing battle against his home team, who seem hell-bent on starting a turf war. Comedy drama, starring Jimmy Jewel, David Swift, Vas Blackwood and Michael Elphick

programme.title: The Thirty-Nine Steps (1978)
programme.desc: An innocent man is informed of a devious plan to start the First World War by murdering a foreign minister. Almost immediately, he is framed for murder and embarks on a perilous cross-country trek to prove his innocence, pursued by both the police and ruthless spies. Thriller - the third film adaptation of John Buchan's novel - starring Robert Powell, Karen Dotrice, John Mills and George Baker

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Choice (2016)
programme.desc: Two neighbours find themselves overwhelmingly attracted to each other, and make substantial changes in their lives to be together - one breaking off a long-term relationship and the other conquering his fear of commitment. Over the next 10 years, their feelings for each other are tested by a series of challenges. Romantic drama based on Nicholas Sparks' novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Teresa Palmer

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Parkland (2013)
programme.desc: The aftermath of the Kennedy assassination is explored from various points of view. As medical staff try unsuccessfully to save the president's life and the FBI pursue the shooter, the family of Lee Harvey Oswald come to realise his role in events and a bystander faces a terrible choice after capturing the killing on film. Fact-based drama, starring Paul Giamatti, Zac Efron and Billy Bob Thornton

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: A fugitive fleeing from a police manhunt is desperate to see his newborn son. Needing a hiding place, he takes a recovering meth addict hostage in her own home. The pair make an unlikely connection as they bond over finding ways to cope with the challenges in their lives. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Mara and David Oyelowo

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Part one of two. Joe's dying grandmother begs him to come and visit one last time on her birthday, and to bring his wife Tiffany along. He had failed to tell his family about the divorce, so Mel is forced to take a road trip to New Jersey and pose as his ex-wife at the party. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Joe's dying grandmother begs him to visit one last time on her birthday, and to bring his wife Tiffany along. He had failed to tell his family about the divorce, so Mel is forced to take a road trip to New Jersey to pose as his ex-wife at the party. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is excited about the prospect of spending Christmas with her sister Meredith, who is on a home visit from prison. However, the festivities turn frosty when Joe realises that he may have to share the holiday season with the woman responsible for wrecking his career. Guest starring Jaime Pressly (My Name Is Earl)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe plans to admit his feelings for Mel after their romantic night in New Jersey, but is stopped when he finds out her ex-boyfriend Austin wants to give the relationship a second chance. Meanwhile, Ryder makes himself sick through his own cooking

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Zander asks Lennox to work with him on a creative project, despite the fact their relationship is currently on hold. Meanwhile, Mel believes it is a good idea for her and Joe to take their new relationship slowly - but he upsets her when he gets another job and moves out of the house. Family comedy starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Billy plans a pig-themed wedding, complete with a world record pig parade, but his prim and proper bride Steph may not be pleased with his decision

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Australian-born Adam plans a 1980s Aussie soap-themed wedding in South Shields, despite the wishes of his fiancee Rachel, who dreams of a classy, sophisticated ceremony

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs (2009)
programme.desc: An orphaned brother and sister face losing their beloved dog when they go into a foster home that does not allow pets. The kids find the ideal hiding place in an abandoned hotel, and set about transforming it into luxury canine accommodation for not just their beloved pet, but every stray in town. Family comedy, starring Emma Roberts, Jake T Austin, Don Cheadle and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Featuring a zombie prank, cats singing the Star Wars theme and an escaped honey badger

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The civilisation of Panem is consumed by a bloody civil war. Reluctant rebel leader Katniss Everdeen leads a band of her allies on a mission to end the conflict at one stroke by assassinating the despotic President Snow - but faces many dangers as she closes in on her target. Conclusion of the sci-fi adventure series based on Suzanne Collins' novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman in his final role

programme.title: X-Men 2 (2003)
programme.desc: Mutant heroes the X-Men are forced into an uneasy alliance with arch-enemy Magneto to battle a common foe. Following an attempt on the US president's life, a sinister military scientist launches a raid on Professor Xavier's school and hatches a plan to rid the world of all mutants. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Alan Cumming, Halle Berry and Brian Cox

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US critique the week's TV, including World of Dance, Good Morning America on Kanye West's 2020 presidential campaign, and Jaws

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A selection of memorable moments from the most recent series, including the armchair critics' opinions on Ant & Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway, One Born Every Minute, The Wine Show, Made in Yorkshire, The Andrew Marr Show, Martin Lewis taking on Facebook on This Morning, Jose Mourinho on Match of the Day and Arsene Wenger on the News

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Derek, an underdog in love and business, meets shy mum-of-two Lisa and their stuttering date bursts into life when they discover a shared passion for dancing, while window cleaner Daniel and Lora bond over nostril waxing and raving. Carlo, 42, meets high-flying lawyer Francesca, 36, but she may be immune to his charms, while firefighter Mark's physique is a hit with Ellie

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorcee Jane wants to find a suitable partner for her son Bobby, and also a new romantic interest for herself, while maths teacher Paul's love of logic and equations is lost on financial advisor Sophie. Barber Lee has suffered from nerves all of his life and can't believe his luck when he's matched with 24-year-old nurse Abigail, but he forgets her name and has an unfortunate accident in the toilets

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Billy plans a pig-themed wedding, complete with a world record pig parade, but his prim and proper bride Steph may not be pleased with his decision

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Australian-born Adam plans a 1980s Aussie soap-themed wedding in South Shields, despite the wishes of his fiancee Rachel, who dreams of a classy, sophisticated ceremony

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Martine demands to know what is going on with Felix, while Brody is on a mission to get justice, but Sienna suggests that he might need to deal with his own demons instead

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Babylon in New York, where the peace of Long Island is regularly shattered by the volatile Pellegrino family, proprietors of Peter's Italian Restaurant. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which Jo Frost offers child-rearing advice to parents. In the opening edition, she helps working parents Jessica and CJ Braido, who feel they're being overrun by their four small children, and struggle to agree on what parenting methods to adopt

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Jack plans a haunting, horror-themed wedding, while his bride-to-be Becka dreams of a traditional Scottish affair. As Jack recruits the Grim Reaper and covers Becka's wedding dress in fake blood, he hopes his eerie marital concept will prove a screaming success and not a fright night disaster

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Flushed Away (2006)
programme.desc: A pampered pet rodent is flushed down a toilet and ends up in a vast underground rat city in the sewers of London. He is befriended by a quick-witted rat who offers to help him find his way home, but first the hapless pair have to escape the clutches of an evil toad bent on ridding the rodent metropolis of its residents. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Ian McKellen, Shane Richie, Jean Reno and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, including a man pretending to be a walrus, an incredible downhill bike run and some computer keyboard hurling

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry plans big romantic gestures for Lainey on high school prom night, while Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together, but things don't go as planned. Adam is thrilled when a nerdy but cute girl asks him out, but is horrified when Beverly gets involved

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry attempts to drive a wedge between Adam and Pops when they debate the merits of a recently released Batman movie. Erica deliberately makes a mess of her interview at one university so that she will only receive an offer from her first choice of college, but her plan goes badly awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey, Sean Giambrone and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray is honoured as one of the area's top businessmen, Beverly's attempt to help her husband find a hobby backfires, and Erica comes to the rescue when Barry's scheme to steal golf carts goes awry

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A scary TV movie motivates Barry to beg his father to build an underground bunker for the family, but Murray isn't easily persuaded. Erica and Adam go over the top with lavish Mother's Day gifts for Beverly before bringing important requests to her. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Raj's best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: Jacob and the Crows go searching for the newest homicidal threat to the city, and Kate starts questioning the loyalty of everyone around her just when she needs them the most

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isn't bothered by his posh boy charm. There's also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. There's also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Supernatural
programme.desc: Sam and Dean continue to worry about the condition of Jack's soul. Fantasy drama, starring Jensen Ackles and Jared Padalecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics features their thoughts on programmes from September 2018. Shows under consideration include talent show The X Factor, espionage drama Bodyguard, documentary Reported Missing, science programme The Joy of AI and slimming series The Extreme Diet Hotel

programme.title: Batwoman
